allow: PowerShell($git = \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); $gh = \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "git: $\(if\($git\){$git.Source}else{'NOT INSTALLED'}\)"; "gh:  $\(if\($gh\){$gh.Source}else{'NOT INSTALLED'}\)"; if\($gh\){ "--- gh auth status ---"; gh auth status 2>&1 })
